description_long: This object is a compact pair of over-ear headphones with a thin, arched headband connecting two rounded ear cups. The ear cups are oval-shaped and appear to be padded for comfort, with a glossy exterior shell. The headband is slender and metallic, likely adjustable, and connects to the ear cups via small hinges or joints. The headphones are designed to rest on the head, with the ear cups covering the ears to provide audio output. The overall design is minimalistic and modern, with a focus on portability and lightweight construction. The object is suitable for personal audio use in urban environments such as public transport, parks, or sidewalks.
description: A sleek, compact pair of over-ear headphones with a thin metallic headband and glossy oval ear cups, designed for personal audio use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both oval ear cups and the thin, arched headband.
description_view_1: Side view showing the profile of a single ear cup and the slim headband.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, displaying both ear cups and the headband from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the profile of the other ear cup.
